allow: Bash(node -e "const q=require\('./src/data/questions.json'\); let total=0; const allIds=new Set\(\); let problems=0; for\(const f of ['1','2','3','4']\){const arr=q[f]; total+=arr.length; const c={}; for\(const it of arr\){ if\(!it.id||!it.enunciado||!Array.isArray\(it.alternativas\)||it.alternativas.length!==4||typeof it.correta!=='number'||it.correta<0||it.correta>3\){console.log\('PROBLEMA:',it.id\);problems++;} if\(allIds.has\(it.id\)\){console.log\('ID DUP:',it.id\);problems++;} allIds.add\(it.id\); if\(new Set\(it.alternativas\).size!==4\){console.log\('Alt dup em',it.id\);problems++;} const t=it.id.split\('-'\)[0]; c[t]=\(c[t]||0\)+1;} console.log\('Fase',f,'->',arr.length,JSON.stringify\(c\)\);} console.log\('TOTAL:',total,'| problemas:',problems\);")

Bash(node -e "const q=require\('./src/data/questions.json'\); let total=0; const allIds=new Set\(\); let problems=0; for\(const f of ['1','2','3','4']\){const arr=q[f]; total+=arr.length; for\(const it of arr\){ if\(!it.id||!it.enunciado||!Array.isArray\(it.alternativas\)||it.alternativas.length!==4||typeof it.correta!=='number'||it.correta<0||it.correta>3\){console.log\('PROBLEMA:',it.id\);problems++;} if\(allIds.has\(it.id\)\){console.log\('ID DUP:',it.id\);problems++;} allIds.add\(it.id\); if\(new Set\(it.alternativas\).size!==4\){console.log\('Alt dup em',it.id\);problems++;} } } console.log\('TOTAL:',total,'| problemas:',problems,'| temas/fase:', Object.keys\(q['1'].reduce\(\(a,it\)=>{a[it.id.split\('-'\)[0]]=1;return a;},{}\)\).length\);")
